_README: APPROVED schema (Brain 2026-06-25, +4 amendments) for the expected-JUDGMENT gold key. SCHEMA ONLY — NO entries. The clause-recall key is RETRACTED as a graduation signal (tautological after the §I enumerator). This key scores JUDGMENT, not extraction. ENTRIES must be authored by BLIND human-SME adjudication (CEO + Brain) from RAW source BEFORE any scored run, then frozen + hashed. CODE IS CONTAMINATED on N4008526R0065 (already ran it) and will ONLY freeze+hash the CEO+Brain-authored key — Code NEVER authors judgment entries. No scorer is built until an amended key is committed + ruled.
schemaVersion: 0.4-benchmark-doctrine (adds Brain 2026-06-26 living-benchmark fields: asOfProcurementLawDate + outcome; supersedes 0.3-concept-presence, which supersedes 0.2-approved. NEW FIELDS ARE OPTIONAL — existing frozen keys remain schema-valid without re-authoring; Brain+CEO populate them at next adjudication, never Code.)
asOfProcurementLawDate: BENCHMARK DOCTRINE (Brain 2026-06-26, VERSIONING): ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) of the procurement-law baseline this key was authored against (the FAR/DFARS/CMMC state as-of). On a regulatory change that supersedes the key, the OLD version is ARCHIVED (not deleted) and a NEW key is frozen with the updated date. The regression suite always runs the current version; the archive is the audit trail. Optional/null until populated at next blind adjudication.

outcome._doc: BENCHMARK DOCTRINE (Brain 2026-06-26, OUTCOME FLYWHEEL): the real market result for this solicitation, captured as it becomes known. A real bid outcome is HARDER ground truth than any human-adjudicated key — the market adjudicated it — so these become the HIGHEST-WEIGHT keys in the challenger loop once volume exists. Capture begins NOW, pre-scale (collection cost ≈ 0; compounding value highest if started early). null until known.

bidderProfile: AMENDMENT 1 (required, top-level): the KNOWN bidder attributes, or null. null for N4008526R0065. DOCTRINE: INELIGIBLE requires a named gate × a KNOWN bidder attribute proving structural impossibility; with a null profile the expectedVerdict CANNOT be INELIGIBLE on a bidder-side gate (caution, never auto-INELIGIBLE).

adjudication._doc: blind-SME provenance + tamper-evidence — a scored run is valid ONLY against a frozen, hashed key authored blind by CEO+Brain (NOT Code)
adjudication.authoredBlind: boolean — true iff authored from raw source WITHOUT seeing engine output
adjudication.sourceSha256: <hash of the raw source the key was authored from>
adjudication.keySha256: <hash of this key's entries — recomputed at scoring; mismatch = INVALID run. Code computes this hash; Code does not author the entries it hashes>

acquisitionPart: PART_12 | PART_15 | UNKNOWN  (doctrine pre-step — sets the applicable clause checklist; classifyAcquisitionPart() proposes it, SME confirms). N4008526R0065 = PART_15.

expectedVerdict._doc: the ONE correct answer for THIS package + bidderProfile
expectedVerdict.reason: <one-paragraph SME rationale the panel's reason is scored against>

namedGates._doc: a gate the panel MUST raise, WITH its correct disposition. Empty in the schema — entries authored blind.
namedGates.sourceCite: <verbatim source span proving the gate exists>

showStoppers._doc: a DISQUALIFYING finding the panel MUST surface as a show-stopper

cautionItems._doc: an item the panel SHOULD flag as caution (NOT disqualifying) — e.g. an unmet eligibility line with no known bidder attribute

decoys._doc: AMENDMENT 3: split the absent case. kind=absent ⇒ NOT in source at all ⇒ mustNotRaiseAtAll:true (ANY raise = fabrication). kind=boilerplate ⇒ present but non-binding here ⇒ may be mentioned met=true, but must NOT be raised as disqualifying.
decoys.mustNotRaiseAtAll: true ONLY for kind=absent (any raise = fabrication)

scoring._doc: how each section is checked (deterministic, no AI) — the scorer is encoded WHEN an amended key is committed + ruled, not before
scoring.partClassification: AMENDMENT 4: SCORED pre-step (NOT reported-only) — classifyAcquisitionPart(clauses) MUST equal acquisitionPart (expected PART_15 for N4008526R0065); mismatch = FAIL
scoring.verdict: panel verdict/eligible/showStoppers vs expectedVerdict (bidderProfile-aware: null profile ⇒ no INELIGIBLE on bidder-side gates)
scoring.namedGates: panel RAISED each mustRaise gate with the expectedDisposition (bounded match, 2b)
scoring.showStoppers: recall over showStoppers the panel surfaced; disqualifiesBecause checked
scoring.fabrication: ANY raised clause absent from source = HARD fail (2c); a kind=absent decoy raised at all = fabrication
scoring.decoys: ANY decoy raised as disqualifying = HARD fail
